- [x] Scaffold the Project — Project structure and Docker/devcontainer scaffolding complete.
- [x] Customize the Project — Security, modularization, and onboarding improvements applied.

- [x] Compile the Project — Build/test/lint workflows implemented for all subprojects.
- [x] Create and Run Task — Tasks and scripts for onboarding, build, and test created.
- [x] Launch the Project — docker-compose and deployment docs provided.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — All major docs (ARCHITECTURE.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, ONBOARDING.md, SECURITY_HEADERS.md) written and referenced.

All checklist items are complete. The project is fully scaffolded, modernized, and documented per best practices.
